description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsCharcoal grey satchel style bag with a haul loop and two short handlesHas a foldover detail (with buttons)Has a zipped main compartment with two pouches, a zipped separator and zipped pocketHas a zipped pocket at the backFirm baseMaterial and Care CanvasWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight (folded): 29 cmHeight (unfolded): 40 cmWidth: 45 cmDepth: 10 cm
